tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Thank you @Gwynne_Shotwell & Robert! 🙏🚀 Gifting @SpaceX shares to 2M kids’ @TrumpAccounts is legendary generosity. Empowering the next generation with ownership in our future among the stars 🇺🇸 Pure inspiration! @altcap
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：谢谢@Gwynne_Shotwell 和 Robert！ 🙏🚀 将 @SpaceX 的分享赠送给 200 万个孩子的 @TrumpAccounts 是传奇般的慷慨。赋予下一代对我们的未来在星空中的所有权🇺🇸纯粹的灵感！ @altcap

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: One of Elon Musk’s companies, Tesla, is making cars for blind people. Another one of his companies, Neuralink, is working on restoring sight to the blind.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：埃隆·马斯克的公司之一特斯拉正在为盲人生产汽车。他的另一家公司 Neuralink 正在致力于帮助盲人恢复视力。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: My husband and I are honored and thrilled to participate in the Invest America program and gift a share of our SpaceX stock to a Trump Account for each of more than two million children across our great nation. Every American child under 18 can benefit from having a Trump Account, but our gift specifically goes to the Accounts of children (ages 11-17) that live in areas with lower average household incomes with a bit more emphasis for those that live near our central Texas home. We have been fortunate in our careers and hope this gift encourages the next generation to continue the journey of enabling humanity to live and fly amongst the stars. A huge thanks to all that worked to bring this incredible program to life.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：我和丈夫很荣幸也很兴奋能够参与投资美国计划，并将我们的 SpaceX 股票的一部分捐赠给特朗普账户，为我们伟大国家超过 200 万的儿童提供帮助。每个 18 岁以下的美国儿童都可以从拥有特朗普账户中受益，但我们的礼物专门提供给居住在平均家庭收入较低地区的儿童（11-17 岁）的账户，特别是那些居住在我们得克萨斯州中部住宅附近的儿童。我们的职业生涯很幸运，希望这份礼物能够鼓励下一代继续让人类在星空中生活和飞行的旅程。非常感谢所有为实现这一令人难以置信的计划而付出努力的人。

tweets.content: R to @cz_binance: I thought this was a 5-minute photo shoot, for a portrait head shot. So, I wear a Binance polo shirt and jogging pants. I didn't think it would turn into a full body, multiple angle shoot. 🤣 Platon is a master in his art.
tweets.translated: R 致@cz_binance：我认为这是一个 5 分钟的照片拍摄，用于肖像头像拍摄。所以，我穿着币安 Polo 衫和慢跑裤。我没想到它会变成全身多角度拍摄。 🤣 柏拉图是他的艺术大师。

tweets.content: I don't own or know any of these coins. I interact with positive people in our communities. May the best memes win! #BNB
tweets.translated: 我不拥有也不了解这些硬币。我与社区中积极的人互动。愿最好的模因获胜！ #BNB

tweets.content: The cover photo of Freedom of Money book (and my current avatar) was photographed by Platon. It was one funky photo shoot. There was an interesting conversation as well. Watch the video. (Filmed 5 months ago). https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GWRtN6C90KQ
tweets.translated: 《金钱自由》一书的封面照片（以及我现在的头像）是柏拉图拍摄的。这是一张时髦的照片。还有一段有趣的对话。观看视频。 （5个月前拍摄）。 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GWRtN6C90KQ

tweets.content: It’s interesting to witness psychology around valuation anchoring + scarcity. Retail, for example, are buying Figure, last valued at ~$39B through CEFs… At $158B, since it’s private, round 4x valuations. Then Agility Robotics $CCXI, which has broader commercialization. Is at ~$4.3B pre-money and publicly available before the name change. At closer pricing that $AMZN, $NVDA, SoftBank, and Foxconn vaulted it at. Yet some end up paying 4-5x prices of already hiked private investor rounds for exposure… I’m convinced if Agility raised a very small private round at $39B as well from $2.5B (which it definitely could), to set a valuation anchor. Investors would be foaming in the mouth for a private allocation, just due to psychology rather than underlying fundamentals. We’ve also seen this anchoring with $SPCX recently at $1.75T. Peak market inefficiency? Or lack of knowledge from retail?
tweets.translated: 见证围绕估值锚定+稀缺性的心理是很有趣的。例如，零售业正在购买Figure，通过 CEF 最后估值约为 $39B……价格为 $158B，因为它是私人的，估值约为 4 倍。然后是 Agility Robotics $CCXI，其商业化范围更广。预付款价格约为 4.3B 美元，并在更名前公开发布。更接近的定价是 $AMZN、$NVDA、软银和富士康的定价。然而，有些人最终会支付已经上涨的私人投资者轮次的 4-5 倍的价格来获得曝光……我相信，如果 Agility 也以 39B 美元的价格从 2.5B 美元（这绝对可以）筹集到一个非常小的私人轮次，以设定估值锚点。投资者可能会因为私人配置而口吐白沫，这只是出于心理因素，而不是基本面因素。我们最近还看到 $SPCX 锚定在 $1.75T。高峰期市场效率低下？还是缺乏零售知识？

tweets.content: $NVDA refuting recent Kyber delay claims: “Our roadmap is intact”. lol, damage has already been done with stocks in many markets (esp. in Taiwan/Japan/Soutj Korea) crashing after the “report”
tweets.translated: $NVDA 驳斥了最近 Kyber 延迟的说法：“我们的路线图完好无损”。哈哈，许多市场（特别是台湾/日本/韩国）的股票在“报告”发布后暴跌，已经造成了损害

tweets.content: I’d like to give a special thank you to Bloomberg’s piece on $META compute. As well as the 2 back to back bear posts on CPO delays. But I believe thematically photonics, memory, energy, and physical AI will outperform in the long run.
tweets.translated: 我要特别感谢 Bloomberg 关于 $META 计算的文章。以及 2 个背靠背的关于 CPO 延误的帖子。但我相信，从长远来看，光子学、记忆、能源和物理人工智能等主题将表现出色。
